fault_hypothesis: The clamping logic on line 67 is incorrect. When the counter value exceeds `max_value`, it should be set to `max_value`, but it is incorrectly set to `max_value - 1`.

constraints.intent: After clamping, the value should be exactly the maximum allowed value.
The clamped value, immediately after assignment, must be equal to the ceiling.

spec.expr: max_value is None or new_value__3 == min(new_value__1, max_value)

constraints.intent: The final value stored must be the smaller of the incremented value and the ceiling.
When the value exceeds the ceiling, it must be clamped to the ceiling.
